description: Knowledge retrieval, evidence lookup, synthesis, and answer grounding workflows.
design_rules: Tasks must stay vendor-neutral within the category.
Tasks should be short enough for high sample count and repeated simulation.
Fake tools should preserve differentiated product logic, not just naming differences.

core_tasks.title: Find relevant knowledge
core_tasks.goal: Retrieve the most relevant docs or notes for a query.

core_tasks.title: Synthesize an answer
core_tasks.goal: Answer a question using multiple knowledge sources.

core_tasks.title: Compare conflicting sources
core_tasks.goal: Explain differences or tensions across sources.

core_tasks.title: Identify missing context
core_tasks.goal: Point out what is still unknown or underspecified.

explicit_exclusions: Index schema management as required tasks
